context-hook.ts caches capability detection once per session in a module-level `_capability` variable with no refresh mechanism, while append-system.ts re-checks fresh each time via `before_agent_start`. The comment on context-hook.ts line 10 is misleading (claims detection is deferred to append-system.ts). The preamble renders a potentially stale capability level while the system prompt shows current capability.
